headline: A Look At Republic Services (RSG) Valuation After Steady Multi‑Year Shareholder Returns
summary: Why Republic Services stock is drawing fresh attention Republic Services (RSG) is back on investors’ radar after recent share price moves and updated fundamental data, including revenue of US$16.6b and net income of US$2.1b, prompted a closer look at its current valuation. See our latest analysis for Republic Services. Recent share price moves look steady rather than dramatic, with a 30 day share price return of 5.1% and a 90 day share price return of 9.3%.
